description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MiNiFi-CPP CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have multiple jobs for different environments including macOS with Xcode 11.2.1 and 12.0, Windows with VS2017 and VS2019, and Ubuntu 16.04, 16.04 with GCC 4.8, 20.04, and 20.04 with all clang. Each job should check out the code, cache dependencies, install required packages, set up the environment, build, and test the project.
